metadata.name: Tribute — Fanatic of Xenagos, tribute declined (not paid)
metadata.description: p1 casts Fanatic of Xenagos ({1}{R}{G}, 3/3 Centaur Warrior, Trample, Tribute 1). P2 declines tribute (bot auto-declines). Because tribute was not paid, the TributeNotPaid trigger fires inline at ETB time (CR 702.104b + 603.4): Fanatic gets a +1/+1 counter (effective 4/4) and gains haste until end of turn. All effects apply immediately as Fanatic enters — no separate stack trigger step (engine fires tribute trigger inline like other ETB triggers). Asserts: Fanatic on p1 battlefield with +1/+1 counter, stack empty.
metadata.generation_notes: Tribute fires inline in fire_when_enters_triggered_effects() (replacement.rs:950) — not as a separate stack object. The trigger effect executes immediately during ETB processing: AddCounter(+1/+1, 1) on source, then ApplyContinuousEffect(Haste, UntilEndOfTurn) on source. Script simplified to match engine behavior: no intermediate 'TributeTrigger on stack' step.

script.step_note: p1 casts Fanatic of Xenagos. It resolves and enters the battlefield. P2 (chosen tribute opponent) auto-declines tribute. The TributeNotPaid trigger fires inline at ETB: Fanatic gets +1/+1 counter (4/4 effective) and haste until EOT.

actions.description: Initial: Fanatic of Xenagos in p1 hand; battlefield empty; p1 has {1}{R}{G} in pool; stack empty
actions.note: p1 has {1}{R}{G} in pool — exactly enough to cast Fanatic of Xenagos. Battlefield is empty.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Fanatic of Xenagos ({1}{R}{G}). Fanatic moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After cast: Fanatic of Xenagos on stack (count 1); p1 hand empty
actions.note: Fanatic of Xenagos is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Fanatic of Xenagos resolves (CR 608.2).

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Fanatic of Xenagos enters the battlefield. CR 702.104a: Tribute 1 — p2 declines (bot auto-declines), tribute_was_paid stays false. CR 702.104b + 603.4: TributeNotPaid trigger fires inline — Fanatic gets +1/+1 counter and haste until EOT.

actions.note: Fanatic resolves. ETB processing fires tribute trigger inline: +1/+1 counter added, haste continuous effect applied.
CR 704.3: SBAs checked. Fanatic toughness = 4 (3 base + 1 counter), no damage — no SBAs.

actions.description: Final: Fanatic of Xenagos on p1 battlefield with 1 +1/+1 counter (4/4 effective); stack empty; life totals unchanged
actions.note: CR 702.104b: Tribute not paid — +1/+1 counter granted (Fanatic now 4/4) and haste granted until EOT. Stack empty.
